pages_default_Entry:{\"uid\":\"55bc0ed6-.title: Built for parishes to thrive
pages_default_Entry:{\"uid\":\"55bc0ed6-.text: Whether you are planning a single liturgy, or an entire season, Liturgia is designed for seamless and efficient preparation at any scale.

heroColumns_column_BlockType:{\"uid\":\".text: Unlock a complete suite of tools to help parishes confidently organise and celebrate meaningful liturgical events. From planning to execution, everything is designed to support vibrant and engaging worship.
Reduce complexity in liturgy preparation with easy access to approved texts, prayers, and planning resources.
Foster a deeper connection within your community through resources that nurture spiritual growth, encourage participation, and pass on the traditions of our faith.

modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".moduleTitle: Templates for Sunday and weekday Masses
modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".text: Liturgia offers carefully crafted templates for Sunday and weekday Masses in accordance with the approved ritual books. For every liturgical day and ritual celebration, all approved readings and Mass texts are provided. No need to type any texts or worry about getting things in the right order; Simply view the texts that can be chosen for each element of the liturgy and click to make your selection.

Liturgia provides all the resources needed to prepare baptisms, funerals, weddings, and other ritual celebrations. With clear guidance and adaptable tools, it supports the creation of ceremonies that honour each occasion and engage the congregation. An additional feature allows for the creation of Word and PDF booklets, or Powerpoint presentations, enabling full and active participation by the gathered assembly.

modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".moduleTitle: Daily readings, prayers, and hymns at a glance
modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".text: Liturgia offers effortless access to daily readings, prayers, and hymn suggestions, streamlining preparation for each day’s liturgy. With everything organised in one place, including homily notes and commentaries, planning and reflection become seamless. Simply select the date and liturgy type to unlock a comprehensive library of resources tailored to your needs.

modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".moduleTitle: Comprehensive library of official liturgical texts
modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".text: Liturgia provides a complete collection of approved liturgical texts for every occasion, ensuring all necessary resources are at your fingertips. From the Roman Missal and the Ceremonial of Bishops to the Book of Blessings and the Rites of Christian Initiation, everything is conveniently organised in one easy-to-use platform.

Liturgia offers a range of resources specifically designed for children’s liturgy, helping to engage young minds and nurture their growing faith. With age-appropriate prayers, readings, and activities, these materials encourage meaningful participation and foster a deeper connection to the liturgy.

modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".moduleTitle: Music recommendations for Sundays and Solemnities
modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".text: Liturgia provides tailored music suggestions for Sundays and Solemnities that correspond to the readings of the day and the liturgical season. Music suggestions are organised according to the parts of the Mass for which they are suitable. Recommendations are also offered for music at ritual celebrations such as baptisms, weddings, and funerals.

Liturgia allows you to instantly generate Word documents, PDFs, or PowerPoint presentations, streamlining the sharing and presentation of liturgical materials. This feature ensures everything is prepared with ease, enabling the congregation to fully engage and participate in the service.

Liturgia offers a detailed ordo that covers every celebration of the liturgical year. This essential resource provides clergy and liturgy teams with accurate guidance for planning each Mass and liturgical event. The Ordo is updated annually to ensure it remains current.

Liturgia is a web-based software that can be accessed on any modern device with an internet connection. To ensure the best user experience, we recommend the following:

Recommended Web Browsers
Google Chrome (latest version)
Mozilla Firefox (latest version)
Apple Safari (latest version)
Microsoft Edge (latest version)

Screen Resolution
For the best user experience, a screen resolution of at least 1280x720 is recommended. Higher resolutions (e.g., 1920x1080 or greater) will provide a more comfortable interface.

modules_column_BlockType:{\"uid\":\"f064.text: Blend in or stand out – choose from six refined colours

modules_textAndMediaItem_BlockType:{\"ui.moduleTitle: Inspiring Deeper Parish Connections Through Collaboration
Equipping the Church with Modern Tools
